heading: LEASEHOLD AND OTHER POSSESSORY INTERESTS IN EXEMPT PROPERTY
operative_text: Except as provided by Subsection (b) of this section, a leasehold or other possessory interest in real property that is exempt from taxation to the owner of the estate or interest encumbered by the possessory interest shall be listed in the name of the owner of the possessory interest if the duration of the interest may be at least one year.
cross_refs: Bus. & Com. Code ch. 681, subch. C
Loc. Gov. Code subtitle C1, tit. 12
